brand.subtitle: First-time setup
welcome.heading: Choose Setup Language
welcome.lead: This language will be used for the installer and as the default admin interface language.
welcome.language_help: You can change the admin interface language later in System Settings.
welcome.option_en_help: Admin UI and installer in English
welcome.option_zh_help: Installer and admin UI in Simplified Chinese
step.database.title: Database
step.database.copy: Connect PostgreSQL and create the database when needed
step.site.title: Site Info
step.site.copy: Set the site title, theme, and administrator account
step.success.title: Finish
step.success.copy: Write config, migrate tables, and switch to the live site
database.heading: Enter PostgreSQL Connection Details
database.lead: GoPress tests the connection first. If the target database does not exist, it will try to create it before continuing.
database.required_lead: All required fields must be filled in.
database.intro: Before continuing, prepare your PostgreSQL connection details. GoPress will test the database connection, write local configuration, initialize tables, and create the administrator account.
database.note_create: If the target database does not exist, GoPress will try to create it after the connection check succeeds.
database.note_switch: After setup completes, the current process switches directly to the live site. No manual TOML edit is required.
database.name: Target database name
database.name_help: If the database does not exist, GoPress will try to connect to `postgres` / `template1` with the same account and create it.
database.table_prefix_help: All core table names will use this prefix, for example gp_contents. Use a different prefix for multiple GoPress instances in the same database.
database.server_port_help: This port is written to config. If changed, it takes effect after restarting GoPress.
database.test_success: Database connection succeeded. You can continue.
database.test_failed_network: Database connection test failed. Check the network or service status.
site.heading: Enter Site and Administrator Details
site.lead: This step initializes core tables, creates the administrator account, and marks the site as installed.
site.name: Site title
site.url_help: Canonical URLs, sitemap, and admin display will use this address after setup.
site.timezone_help: Used to parse admin publish times and display content dates. Choose the main timezone for this site.
success.heading: GoPress Is Ready
success.lead: The installer has written configuration and switched to live site mode. You can now log in to the admin panel.
success.activate_failed_heading: Core installation completed, but switching to live site failed
success.activate_failed_lead: Configuration and database are ready. Fix the error and restart GoPress directly.
success.summary: GoPress initialization is complete. Database connection, config file, core tables, and administrator account are ready.
success.db_saved: Database connection details are stored in the local config file with strict permissions.
success.jwt: JWT secret was generated automatically. No manual edit is required.
success.port: If you changed the listen port during setup, restart GoPress to use the new port.
error.database_required: Fill in the PostgreSQL connection details.
error.site_required: Fill in all site and administrator details.
error.password_mismatch: The administrator passwords do not match.
error.target_database_connect_failed: Failed to connect to target database
error.site_dir_from_url_failed: Failed to generate site directory from site URL
